# Growth Kinetics

**Summary**: The study of the rate of change of living systems over time.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2016]] analyzed growth kinetics to determine how environmental factors affect biomass production.

## Scientific Context

- [[2016-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2016]] Determines the efficiency of a strain in a production environment.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2016-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2016]] Measured via optical density and dry weight.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- S2 showed highest optical density and dry weight, while S3 showed the lowest value at both temperatures. ([[2016-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2016, p. 11]])
